alerts.title: Thermal runaway risk
alerts.description: Casing temperature exceeded 85°C threshold for more than 5 consecutive minutes. Immediate inspection recommended.

alerts.title: Abnormal vibration pattern
alerts.description: Vibration amplitude reached 3.76 mm/s, indicating potential bearing wear or shaft misalignment.

alerts.title: Elevated operating temperature
alerts.description: Inlet temperature trending 12% above the 7-day baseline. Monitor for continued rise.

alerts.title: Reduced cooling efficiency
alerts.description: Delta-T across the heat exchanger has dropped below expected range for current load.

alerts.title: Scheduled maintenance due
alerts.description: Preventive maintenance window opens in 48 hours. No immediate action required.

alerts.title: Pressure spike detected
alerts.description: Discharge pressure briefly exceeded 150 psi during load transition at 04:42 UTC.

alerts.title: Device unreachable
alerts.description: Edge collector has not reported telemetry for over 90 minutes. Last heartbeat at 03:12 UTC.

alerts.title: Firmware update available
alerts.description: Controller firmware v2.4.1 is available. Update can be scheduled during next maintenance window.

alerts.title: Power draw variance
alerts.description: Power consumption fluctuating ±8% from baseline during idle periods.

alerts.title: Motor current threshold
alerts.description: Drive motor current exceeded nominal rating during peak load cycle.
